retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operations are incidental to kobject creation and error cleanup.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of btrfs_sysfs_add_device is to create sysfs entries (a link and a kobject) for a btrfs device. The kobject_init_and_add and kobject_put calls are part of the kobject lifecycle but are not the main purpose; the function performs significant I/O/sysfs operations and error handling beyond refcount management.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operations are incidental to kobject creation and error cleanup.
